PowerShell(curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "geo US + cookie ko: %{http_code} -> %{redirect_url}`n" -H "x-vercel-ip-country: US" -b "NEXT_LOCALE=ko" http://localhost:3000/)
PowerShell(curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "geo KR + cookie en: %{http_code} -> %{redirect_url}`n" -H "x-vercel-ip-country: KR" -b "NEXT_LOCALE=en" http://localhost:3000/)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://min-api.cryptocompare.com/data/v2/news/?lang=EN' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "status=$\($r.StatusCode\) type=$\($j.Type\) msg=$\($j.Message\) count=$\($j.Data.Count\)"; $j.Data[0].title } catch { Write-Output "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\('https://www.coindesk.com/arc/outboundfeeds/rss/', 'https://cointelegraph.com/rss'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $itemCount = \([regex]::Matches\($r.Content, '<item>'\)\).Count; Write-Output "$u => $\($r.StatusCode\), items=$itemCount, len=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "$u => FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($bin = "node_modules\\@embedded-postgres\\windows-x64\\native\\bin"; Get-ChildItem $bin | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; & "$bin\\initdb.exe" -U postgres -A trust -E UTF8 --no-locale -D .pgdata 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)
